zh.Bethersden, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特貝黑斯達
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Lovelace II於1480年出生在英國英格蘭肯特貝黑斯達時，他的父親William John Lovelace45歲，母親Lady Laura Peckham40歲。他和Alice Mae Stevens Shawe至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1541年4月6日在他的家鄉享年61歲。

zh-hans.Bethersden, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特貝黑斯達
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Lovelace II于1480年出生在英国英格兰肯特貝黑斯達时，他的父亲William John Lovelace45岁，母亲Lady Laura Peckham40岁。他和Alice Mae Stevens Shawe至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1541年4月6日在他的家乡享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lovelace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Loveless  . The spelling is apparently theresult of folk etymology, which understood the word as a nickname fora dandy fond of lace. The modern sense of this word is, however, notattested until the 16th century and at the time of surname formationit meant only ‘cord’ or ‘shoelace’.

variants.name: Loveless
meanings: nickname from Middle English loveles ‘loveless, without love’, probably in the sense ‘fancy free’.
some early examples, such as Richard Lovelas (Kent 1344), may have as their second element Middle English las(se) ‘girl’, ‘maiden’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Lovelace II was born in 1480, in Bethersden, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, William John Lovelace, was 45 and his mother, Lady Laura Peckham, was 40. He had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Alice Mae Stevens Shawe. He died on 6 April 1541, in his hometown, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Lovelace II est né en 1480, à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William John Lovelace, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Lady Laura Peckham, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Alice Mae Stevens Shawe. Il est décédé le 6 avril 1541, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Lovelace II 1480 in Bethersden, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William John Lovelace 45 und seine Mutter Lady Laura Peckham 40. Er hatte mit Alice Mae Stevens Shawe mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 6. April 1541 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Lovelace II è nato il nel 1480 nel Bethersden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William John Lovelace, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Lady Laura Peckham, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Alice Mae Stevens Shawe. Morì il 6 aprile 1541, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Lovelace IIが1480年にイギリスイギリスケントベスエルスデンで生まれた時，父William John Lovelaceは45歳，母Lady Laura Peckhamは40歳であった。彼はAlice Mae Stevens Shaweとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1541年4月6日に故郷で61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Lovelace II(이)가 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 베더즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William John Lovelace(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Laura Peckham(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Alice Mae Stevens Shawe(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1541년 4월 6일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Lovelace II nasceu em 1480, em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William John Lovelace, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Lady Laura Peckham, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Alice Mae Stevens Shawe. Ele faleceu em 6 de abril de 1541, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Lovelace II родился в 1480 г. в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William John Lovelace было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Laura Peckham, 40. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Alice Mae Stevens Shawe. Он умер 6 апреля 1541 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Lovelace II nació en 1480, en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William John Lovelace, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Lady Laura Peckham, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Alice Mae Stevens Shawe. Murió el 6 de abril de 1541, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años.
